ops.text:
DONE 2026-07-07 (session 79abb4f4 continuation). Reconciled a version drift discovered on resume + ran the deferred residual cleanup + a full collection refresh.

VERSION DRIFT (found on resume): dev continued on yasyf@yasyf past the 0.9.0 rename — shipped v0.9.1 (0a15e71 cc-family floor bump) and v0.10.0 (40ddf54, BREAKING feat(triage)! adopt cc-transcript 9 model-free verdict identity; floor cc-transcript>=9,<10). Verdict identity dropped model (unique per dedup_key,role,prompt_version; model=provenance); triage gained nullable canonical_key (null for steering). Local main was 2 behind; remote was on a detached HEAD with an unpushed commit 13d4a16 (capt-hook 8.7.0 re-register: SessionEnd+SubagentStop). Reconciled: 13d4a16 now canonical on GitHub, local/GitHub/remote main all agree.

DB v9 MIGRATION (manual, no back-compat per standing rule): rebuilt triage table to match FeedbackStore.verdicts_ddl() — added canonical_key + swapped UNIQUE(...,model) -> UNIQUE(dedup_key,role,prompt_version). 7403 rows preserved, precheck confirmed 0 collision groups. Backup feedback.db.bak-pre-v9.

CLEANUP: mirror moved ~/.cc-pushback/mirrors -> ~/.cc-steer/mirrors (same-fs rename, preserves rsync incrementality); old local ~/.cc-pushback retired (redundant 342MB db + dataset deleted after cmp-verifying bak-pre-steer, MOVED.md left); remote ~/.cc-pushback archived (~/cc-pushback-remote-data-archive-2026-07-07.tar.gz, 24MB) then deleted + MOVED.md; remote stale cc_pushback/ module dir removed; 3 superseded local branches deleted (feat/auq-wiring, feat/question-answer-wiring, recovered/feat-triage-v5); capt-hook wiring already present (13d4a16).

COLLECTION REFRESH: rsync yasyf@yasyf:.claude/projects (+4727 files) -> scan --transcripts ~/.cc-steer/mirrors/yasyf (+282 events) -> triage --model large (280 judged, 0 failed, 4416/4416 at v6, 3525 steering=80%) -> refine --model large (197 events -> 231 pairs, v3 total 4254) -> enrich x3 (corrections/pass 360->10->6, converged; shared ledger cc-steer rows 470->770) -> export --push. Dataset now: traces 4416, sft 3525, dpo 543, kto 4416 (vs S1 baseline 4134/3328/348/4134) pushed to yasyf/cc-steer-traces.

STILL OPEN: PyPI old cc-pushback 0.8.1 not yet yanked (web-UI-only, needs user PyPI session; Chrome ext not connected).
